editorial_thesis: The actionable shift is from isolated AI features to governed systems that connect work context, design delivery and execution without dropping review boundaries.

topic_groups.title: Agent Workflows + Automation
topic_groups.selection_rationale: The old “chat plus copy/paste” pattern is being replaced by project-scoped agents with connected context, scheduled runs, and explicit approvals—an immediate Buildn operations question.

sources.title: ChatGPT Work
sources.why_selected: It packages project persistence, background execution and deliverables into one operating surface.
sources.usefulness: Prototype a client-research-to-brief workflow, but keep outbound sharing behind an approval gate.

sources.title: GPT-5.6 programmatic tool calling
sources.why_selected: Tool-heavy workflows can become cheaper and less brittle when orchestration happens near the tools.
sources.usefulness: Use it for research aggregation, audit evidence collection, or multi-source reporting with a small final evidence set.

sources.title: GPT-Live
sources.why_selected: Voice becomes a control plane for field notes, meeting capture and quick task delegation—not only a dictation layer.
sources.usefulness: Try spoken discovery interviews or on-the-go project capture, then require written review before tasks are created.

topic_groups.title: Design-to-Delivery Systems
topic_groups.selection_rationale: This deliberately rotates away from yesterday’s repeated agent/model and growth lanes: the strongest practical signal is now the disappearing boundary between canvas, design system, code and delivery.

sources.title: Figma skills for its design agent
sources.why_selected: A design system supplies components; skills supply the operating knowledge around them.
sources.usefulness: Create a Buildn “landing-page critique” skill that checks hierarchy, proof, CTA clarity and mobile states before review.

sources.title: Figma MCP server workflows
sources.why_selected: The useful unit is no longer a generated screen; it is a traceable handoff between live business context, design and implementation.
sources.usefulness: Generate kickoff boards or launch-deck drafts from approved briefs, then retain a human design and copy pass.

sources.title: Claude Code to editable Figma designs
sources.why_selected: It makes code-first prototypes reviewable by people who should not need a local environment.
sources.usefulness: Use it to turn a client prototype into a visual QA and decision artifact before polishing or rebuilding.

sources.title: Figma Config 2026: code layers and motion
sources.why_selected: Interaction, motion and code are becoming design-system assets instead of a late implementation surprise.
sources.usefulness: Make motion acceptance criteria and implementation exports part of Buildn prototype handoff.

topic_groups.title: Security + Agent Governance
topic_groups.selection_rationale: Autonomy is rising faster than operational controls. This lane earns inclusion because it supplies immediate guardrails for Buildn’s scheduled and delegated workflows.

sources.title: Microsoft MDASH and Defender–GitHub Code Security integration
sources.why_selected: The direction is clear: agent security needs evidence of exploitability and production exposure, not a larger pile of alerts.
sources.usefulness: Adopt the principle in Buildn reviews: prioritize findings with reachable paths, exposed assets or risky permissions.

sources.title: Secure Future Initiative: July progress report
sources.why_selected: It turns “secure by default” into measurable foundations that translate directly to small teams.
sources.usefulness: Apply the same baseline to Buildn agent hosts: strong MFA, no stale accounts, isolated credentials and approved dependency sources.

sources.title: GitHub Actions runner minimum-version enforcement
sources.why_selected: A scheduler is part of the security boundary. Unmaintained self-hosted agents can become both a delivery and supply-chain liability.
sources.usefulness: Inventory Buildn/client self-hosted runners, verify auto-update reachability and alert before the 30-day window.
